thesis_summary: The long bias is valid only if the gap holds above pre-session demand and any early flush quickly reclaims 28300/VWAP.

checks.label: Gap holds above lower demand
checks.rationale: A break below 28220 would convert the gap from acceptance into rejection.

checks.label: Open is reclaimable, not failed gap
checks.rationale: The bullish setup needs either immediate acceptance or a fast dip-then-reclaim.

checks.label: 10:00 close above 28300
checks.rationale: Reclaiming 28300 confirms buyers are defending the overnight breakout area.

checks.label: Price above session VWAP by mid-morning
checks.rationale: A gap-up long thesis should not remain below VWAP after the first rotation.

checks.label: Lunch holds above breakout base
checks.rationale: Holding above 28270 by noon keeps the afternoon grind setup alive.
